summary: Iteration 62: AI Workflow Builder - 51 Countries + Editable Review View. All features verified. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 verified all AI Workflow Builder features: (1) GET /api/ai-workflow/countries returns 51 countries sorted alphabetically (Argentina to Vietnam), (2) GET /api/step-documents/templates returns 8 verified templates, (3) POST /api/step-documents/ai-suggest-bulk returns template docs without AI (source='template'), (4) POST /api/step-documents/ai-suggest-step-docs returns template source for known products, (5) POST /api/ai-workflow/save saves workflow as product. Frontend: 51 country cards with flags displayed, search/filter works, 8 verified templates section, 'Use Template' loads editable review view, product name/fees/step names/duration days all editable, Add Document/Add Step buttons work, Save as Product button present. NOTE: AI-based endpoints (visa-categories, generate) will fail due to LLM budget exceeded - only template-based flows work.

countries_have_required_fields.details: Each country has id, name, services array

template_ids_present.details: canada_pr, australia_pr, uk_skilled_worker, student_visa_generic, nz_skilled_migrant, usa_h1b, uae_golden_visa, singapore_ep

gallery_view_51_countries.details: 51 country cards with flags displayed in grid

template_loads_review_view.details: 'Use Template' loads workflow into editable review view

review_duration_days_editable.details: Duration days number input is editable

review_add_step_button.details: 'Add Step' button adds new step (6 -> 7 steps)

review_save_as_product_button.details: 'Save as Product' button present and visible

review_delete_step_button.details: Trash icon button visible on each step

gallery_view.hero_section: AI Workflow Builder hero with description
gallery_view.country_grid: 51 country cards with flags, names, and service type counts
gallery_view.search_bar: Functional - filters countries and templates by name
gallery_view.verified_templates: 8 template cards with Use Template buttons

review_view.header: Editable product name, description, steps count, documents count
review_view.fees_section: Editable Government Fees textarea with currency-specific fees
review_view.workflow_steps: Expandable steps with editable names, duration days, documents
review_view.documents: Each document shows Required/Optional badge, edit/delete buttons on hover
review_view.add_document: Add Document button in each step opens form
review_view.add_step: Add Step button at bottom adds new step

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
mocked_apis.ai_generation: LLM budget exceeded - AI-based endpoints (visa-categories, generate) will fail with 500 error

known_limitations.ai_endpoints_failing: POST /api/ai-workflow/visa-categories and POST /api/ai-workflow/generate will return 500 due to LLM budget exceeded. Template-based flows work fine.
